goal: Pivot from full-surface directional prediction to base-conditional trade-quality overlays (veto, early-cut, hold-extension) that improve immutable base trades without modifying base logic.
global_constraints: Base signal logic (active-signal-v1@1) is immutable — never retune hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters.
Do NOT re-open full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features — terminally closed after v4–v7.
Do NOT use CatBoost regression on future PnL — terminally closed.
Do NOT select feature sets, label schemes, horizons, thresholds, or architectures by lockbox window.
Any claimed improvement must pass matched OOS comparison with base on the same trade window.
All work operates on trade-level (executed trades of the base), not on anchor-bar level.
Labels must be frozen before training; thresholds tuned only on selection OOS.
Train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by trade entry timestamp with purge gap ≥ 24h.
Only one main research branch at a time: veto first, then early-cut, then extension.

slices.title: Feature contract для trade-quality overlays
slices.hypothesis: Author, validate, publish, and materialize new trade-quality custom features across families A (entry context), B (post-entry path), C (exit-time context), and D (cross-asset/event confirmation) with priority ordering.
slices.objective: Author, validate, publish, and materialize new trade-quality custom features across families A (entry context), B (post-entry path), C (exit-time context), and D (cross-asset/event confirmation) with priority ordering.
success_criteria: All priority-1 features validated, published, and materialized with acceptable warmup and coverage.
Priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum validated and published.
Feature catalog updated with all new custom features.
Causality check passed — no future leakage.
evidence_requirements: All priority-1 features validated, published, and materialized with acceptable warmup and coverage.
Priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum validated and published.
Feature catalog updated with all new custom features.
Causality check passed — no future leakage.

slices.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces для overlays
slices.hypothesis: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥ 24h, and assemble modeling surfaces for all base trades, long-only, short-only, and weak-window subsets.
slices.objective: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS split by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥ 24h, and assemble modeling surfaces for all base trades, long-only, short-only, and weak-window subsets.
success_criteria: Trade-level split frozen with documented train/validation/test windows.
Feature set and threshold selection rules locked to selection OOS.
evidence_requirements: Trade-level split frozen with documented train/validation/test windows.
Feature set and threshold selection rules locked to selection OOS.

slices.title: Veto-route plausibility stage
slices.hypothesis: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers for long and short sides with balanced/conservative labels, assessing whether worst base trades can be reliably identified on selection OOS.
slices.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers for long and short sides with balanced/conservative labels, assessing whether worst base trades can be reliably identified on selection OOS.
success_criteria: At least one veto model shows ROC AUC > 0.50 meaningfully on selection OOS.
Worst-decile lift is positive and non-trivial.
Economic effect of veto on selection OOS is computed and documented.
Promote/no-promote decision recorded for each model.
evidence_requirements: At least one veto model shows ROC AUC > 0.50 meaningfully on selection OOS.
Worst-decile lift is positive and non-trivial.
Economic effect of veto on selection OOS is computed and documented.
Promote/no-promote decision recorded for each model.
